items.title: Team Onboarding Paved Road
items.description: Team Onboarding Paved Road exists to Make the default team setup path fast enough that product teams stop treating onboarding as a local project. The quarter concentrates on paved-road adoption, default guardrails, AI-era runtime readiness, and cost visibility so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease median team onboarding time by improving portal onboarding, service catalog, and golden-path templates and removing avoidable workflow friction.
Increase self-service completion rate by strengthening portal onboarding, service catalog, and golden-path templates and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase platform adoption across product teams by strengthening portal onboarding, service catalog, and golden-path templates and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released improved service discovery, ownership metadata, and self-service actions.
Released first-party templates for the most common service archetypes.
Released onboarding and self-service telemetry dashboards.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed onboarding improvements in Developer Portal.
Deployed onboarding workflow actions in Platform Self-Service API.
Deployed local setup and diagnostics support in Developer Platform CLI.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Team Onboarding Paved Road: operating discovery

items.title: Runtime Delivery Self-Service
items.description: Runtime Delivery Self-Service exists to Shorten the path from repo to production by making the standard runtime and delivery path more complete, visible, and self-service. The quarter concentrates on paved-road adoption, default guardrails, AI-era runtime readiness, and cost visibility so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.kpi: Time from repo creation to first production deployment
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease time from repo creation to first production deployment by improving environment provisioning, release automation, and runtime connectivity patterns and removing avoidable workflow friction.
Decrease bespoke pipeline maintenance effort by improving environment provisioning, release automation, and runtime connectivity patterns and removing avoidable workflow friction.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce lead time for change by improving environment provisioning, release automation, and runtime connectivity patterns and removing avoidable workflow friction.

businessKPIs.kpi: Cost, Capacity and Usage Insights coverage
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce cost, capacity and usage insights coverage by improving environment provisioning, release automation, and runtime connectivity patterns and removing avoidable workflow friction.

productBricks.change: Released self-service provisioning and ephemeral environment workflows.
Released standard promotion, rollback, and release evidence workflows.
Released runtime connectivity and dependency access reference patterns.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed runtime provisioning improvements in Runtime Provisioning API.
Deployed reusable rollout workflows in CI/CD Pipeline Library.
